title: Bayoneta Evangelion
wikitext:
[]: Bayoneta Evangelion             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 07, 2010 2:38 am Alright, roll with me here.. We were watching Attack of the Show on G4 and one of the girls was talking about some new games and giving a description of some of the new games coming out in 2010 and one is called "Bayoneta". She said something about Angels and being the Eva geek I am I kinda look up from eating only to hear "They tie some things in with Neon Genesis Evangelion". or they pull some things or something along those lines so I look over at my girlfriend to make sure we both heard it correctly. From what I can tell, the theme song plays though out the game. I'm searching Youtube for a video of this. Fly me to the moon http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oQ2QgcRrWlc&feature=related Not sure if Cruel Angel Thesis is on here or not..Maybe.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 07, 2010 2:50 am If that's the same game that I played, then I didn't see anything related to Eva in it, nor did I ever hear that song. Nor do I remember "Angels" ever mentioned.

[]:             Quote Post by ZapX » Thu Jan 07, 2010 3:45 am Here she is fighting angels to FMTTM (Spoilers, I'm assuming). I think at best it's a vague nod to Eva but who knows?

[]:             Quote Post by Merridian » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:18 am "Fly Me to the Moon" was an outrageously popular song even before NGE. There's a chance it could be a nod to NGE, but I highly doubt it. Especially since the rendition I just heard from that youtube link sounds awful. Though it isn't like Shirou Sagisu's countless rearrangements were all that better...

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 07, 2010 11:04 am Hey, I'm just going from what G4 said.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Pointy » Thu Jan 07, 2010 11:08 am I've got the game and the song comes up every once in a while. The soundtrack is rather eclectic, but there's a cheesy pop/jazz thing going for it and the song fits well. I'll admit that I thought of Eva when I heard it. But it's probably coincidence that Fly Me To The Moon is used a game with angels in it. At most, it might be a joking nod to NGE. It's more likely that the song is a reference to SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 07, 2010 2:25 pm Again, just going by what Attack of the show chick said. Try looking for the episode online and watch for yourself.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 07, 2010 7:57 pm Lol. "I've got a fever, and the only cure is more dead angels." That's totally Christopher Walken right there!

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Jan 07, 2010 8:17 pm I stole this statement from Anonymous on /m/ regarding Beyonetta... Evangelion rip off.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jan 07, 2010 8:19 pm Holy Diver wrote: Evangelion rip off.

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:24 pm Sachi wrote: Holy Diver wrote: Evangelion rip off.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Thu Jan 07, 2010 9:45 pm I did not notice anything understand, I only told you what I heard on AOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Thu Jan 07, 2010 11:45 pm Otakon 08 Ikari wrote: I did not notice anything understand, I only told you what I heard on AOTS.

[]:             Quote Post by Taekmkm » Fri Jan 08, 2010 4:19 am Yes, it's an Evangelion parody. The enemies she fight are practically the MP Eva's during the song. Either play the game or just go to youtube like everyone else. [url]http://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3Qs84DiVoKw&feature=related[/url] The whole game is a campy feeling on purpose. People need to know the major difference between "Ripping off" and "affectionate nod." Third, Frank Sinatra isn't a superstar name in Japan. There's no other reason to use Fly Me To the Moon besides Eva nods.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Fri Jan 08, 2010 2:20 pm http://www.thebiographychannel.co.uk/biographies/frank-sinatra.html wrote: He also resumed his singing career in Las Vegas, and toured extensively in the Far East, where he was phenomenally popular, especially in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by chaosakita » Fri Jan 08, 2010 4:12 pm I think the angels do resemble the MP Evas heavily, but who knows what their creators had in mind?

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Fri Jan 08, 2010 11:20 pm To bad the weak point is not some red ball on them or something, looks like a good game.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Sat Jan 09, 2010 3:56 am I think I kinda want this game... It looks somewhat epic, and you kill angels to "Fly Me To The Moon"... That's epic in itself, not even trying to draw parallels to Eva...

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Jan 09, 2010 4:23 am Better screenshots, they don't resemble angels much aside from having wings, a lion's head with another head coming out of its mouth, and goat legs? http://www.the-nextlevel.com/media/360/bayonetta/bayonetta-enemy.jpg http://gamesareevil.com/wp-content/uploads/2009/11/Bayonetta5.jpg

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sat Jan 09, 2010 11:47 am http://ukitakumuki.deviantart.com/art/INTO-THE-BREACH-3928600 I still think they look a bit like them but maybe that is just me.
